title: Auth: Sign Up
intent: Create an account with clear requirements and low friction.
Support validation and password manager flows.
Provide clear consent and legal links where necessary.
structure: Fields: name (optional), email, password; optional terms checkbox.
Password requirements shown as helper text; avoid aggressive error spam while typing.
After success: confirm next step (email verification) with a clear message.

keyboard: Enter submits; focus moves to the first invalid field on failure.

rules: Do not leak whether an email already exists (use generic messaging).
If terms are required, enforce before submit with clear messaging.
error_messaging: Explain password rules in plain language.
If email is in use, say "Use a different email or sign in".

examples.title: Sign-up skeleton
examples.html: <form><label>Email</label><input autocomplete="email" /><label>Password</label><input type="password" autocomplete="new-password" /><label><input type="checkbox" /> I agree</label><button type="submit">Create account</button></form>
